queries.query: List all tables in the database
How many columns does each table have?
queries.sql:
SELECT cl.table_name, COUNT(cl.column_name) AS column_count
FROM column_list AS cl
JOIN table_list AS tl ON cl.table_name = tl.table_name AND cl.db_name = tl.db_name AND cl.org_id = tl.org_id
WHERE tl.org_id = 10006
GROUP BY cl.table_name;

queries.query: Show all primary key columns across all tables
queries.sql:
SELECT cl.column_name, tl.table_name, tl.db_name 
FROM column_list AS cl 
JOIN table_list AS tl ON cl.table_name = tl.table_name AND cl.db_name = tl.db_name AND cl.org_id = tl.org_id 
WHERE cl.column_key = 'PRI' AND cl.org_id = 10006;

queries.query: Show all foreign key relationships
queries.sql:
SELECT r.relationship_id, r.db_name, r.source_table, r.source_column, r.target_table, r.target_column, r.update_rule, r.delete_rule
FROM relationships AS r
JOIN organizations AS o ON r.org_id = o.organization_id
WHERE o.organization_id = 10006;

queries.query: List tables with more than 5 columns
queries.sql:
SELECT tl.table_name, tl.db_name, COUNT(cl.column_name) AS column_count
FROM table_list AS tl
JOIN column_list AS cl ON tl.table_name = cl.table_name AND tl.db_name = cl.db_name AND tl.org_id = cl.org_id
WHERE tl.org_id = 10006
GROUP BY tl.table_name, tl.db_name
HAVING column_count > 5;

queries.query: Show the top 5 tables with the most columns
queries.sql:
SELECT tl.table_name, COUNT(cl.column_name) AS column_count
FROM table_list AS tl
JOIN column_list AS cl ON tl.table_name = cl.table_name AND tl.db_name = cl.db_name AND tl.org_id = cl.org_id
WHERE tl.org_id = 10006
GROUP BY tl.table_name
ORDER BY column_count DESC
LIMIT 5;

queries.query: Count the number of indexes per table
queries.sql:
SELECT tl.table_name, COUNT(im.index_id) AS index_count
FROM table_list AS tl
LEFT JOIN indexes_metadata AS im ON tl.table_name = im.table_name AND tl.db_name = im.db_name AND tl.org_id = im.org_id
WHERE tl.org_id = 10006
GROUP BY tl.table_name;

queries.query: Show tables that have no indexes
queries.sql:
SELECT tl.table_name, tl.db_name 
FROM table_list AS tl 
LEFT JOIN indexes_metadata AS im ON tl.table_name = im.table_name AND tl.db_name = im.db_name AND tl.org_id = im.org_id 
WHERE tl.org_id = 10006 AND im.index_id IS NULL;

queries.query: List all VARCHAR columns across all tables
Show all NOT NULL columns in the database
List all unique indexes in the database
Show all tables along with their engines
Find all auto_increment columns
Show all tables and their row counts
List all columns with default values
Which tables have composite primary keys?
queries.sql:
SELECT tl.table_name, tl.db_name, tl.org_id 
FROM table_list AS tl 
WHERE tl.org_id = 10006 
AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM information_schema.key_column_usage 
      WHERE table_name = tl.table_name 
      AND table_schema = tl.db_name 
      AND organization_id = 10006) > 1;

queries.query: Show all columns that are part of a foreign key
queries.sql:
SELECT cl.column_name, cl.table_name, cl.db_name, cl.data_type, cl.column_type, r.constraint_name, r.target_table, r.target_column
FROM column_list AS cl
JOIN relationships AS r ON cl.table_name = r.source_table AND cl.column_name = r.source_column
WHERE cl.org_id = 10006 AND r.org_id = 10006;

queries.query: List tables that reference other tables (parent tables)
queries.sql:
SELECT tl.table_name, tl.db_name, tl.table_type, tl.engine, tl.table_rows
FROM table_list AS tl
JOIN column_list AS cl ON tl.table_name = cl.table_name AND tl.db_name = cl.db_name AND tl.org_id = cl.org_id
WHERE tl.org_id = 10006
GROUP BY tl.table_name, tl.db_name, tl.table_type, tl.engine, tl.table_rows
HAVING COUNT(cl.table_name) > 0;

queries.query: Which tables are referenced by foreign keys (child tables)?
Show all indexes that are not primary keys
List all columns in all tables ordered by table name
queries.sql:
SELECT cl.column_name, cl.table_name, cl.db_name, cl.data_type, cl.column_type 
FROM column_list AS cl
JOIN table_list AS tl ON cl.table_name = tl.table_name AND cl.db_name = tl.db_name AND cl.org_id = tl.org_id
WHERE cl.org_id = 10006 AND tl.org_id = 10006
ORDER BY cl.table_name;

queries.query: Show all date or datetime columns in the database
Which columns are of type BIGINT?
Show all boolean columns
Show all TEXT or LONGTEXT columns
List all tables with their column count and row count
queries.sql:
SELECT tl.table_name, COUNT(cl.column_name) AS column_count, tl.table_rows
FROM table_list AS tl
LEFT JOIN column_list AS cl ON tl.table_name = cl.table_name AND tl.db_name = cl.db_name AND tl.org_id = cl.org_id
WHERE tl.org_id = 10006
GROUP BY tl.table_name, tl.table_rows;

queries.query: Show all columns that allow NULL values
Find all columns named "id" or containing "id" in their name
Show tables that have more than one index
queries.sql:
SELECT tl.table_name, tl.db_name, COUNT(im.index_id) AS index_count
FROM table_list AS tl
JOIN indexes_metadata AS im ON tl.table_name = im.table_name AND tl.db_name = im.db_name AND tl.org_id = im.org_id
WHERE tl.org_id = 10006
GROUP BY tl.table_name, tl.db_name
HAVING index_count > 1;

queries.query: List all constraints in the database
queries.sql:
SELECT r.db_name, r.org_id, r.constraint_name
FROM relationships AS r
JOIN db AS d ON r.db_name = d.db_name AND r.org_id = d.org_id
WHERE d.org_id = 10006;

queries.query: List all tables and their estimated row counts
Show the relationship between all tables via foreign keys
queries.sql:
SELECT 
    r.relationship_id,
    r.org_id,
    r.db_name,
    r.constraint_name,
    r.source_table,
    r.source_column,
    r.target_table,
    r.target_column,
    r.update_rule,
    r.delete_rule,
    t.table_name,
    t.table_type,
    t.engine,
    t.table_rows
FROM 
    relationships AS r
JOIN 
    table_list AS t ON r.db_name = t.db_name AND r.org_id = t.org_id
WHERE 
    r.org_id = 10006 AND t.org_id = 10006;

queries.query: Which tables have no foreign key references?
queries.sql:
SELECT tl.table_name, tl.db_name 
FROM table_list AS tl 
LEFT JOIN relationships AS r ON tl.table_name = r.source_table AND tl.db_name = r.db_name AND tl.org_id = r.org_id 
WHERE tl.org_id = 10006 AND r.relationship_id IS NULL;

queries.query: List all unique constraints in all tables
queries.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT c.table_name, c.column_name
FROM column_list AS c
JOIN table_list AS t ON c.table_name = t.table_name AND c.db_name = t.db_name AND c.org_id = t.org_id
WHERE t.org_id = 10006;

queries.query: Show all columns that are indexed
queries.sql:
SELECT cl.column_name, cl.table_name, cl.db_name, im.index_name
FROM column_list AS cl
JOIN indexes_metadata AS im ON cl.org_id = im.org_id AND cl.db_name = im.db_name AND cl.table_name = im.table_name AND cl.column_name = im.column_name
WHERE cl.org_id = 10006;

queries.query: Which columns appear in more than one table?
queries.sql:
SELECT cl1.column_name
FROM column_list cl1
JOIN column_list cl2 ON cl1.column_name = cl2.column_name 
WHERE cl1.org_id = 10006 AND cl2.org_id = 10006 AND cl1.table_name <> cl2.table_name
GROUP BY cl1.column_name;

queries.query: Show all tables that have a created_at column
queries.sql:
SELECT tl.table_name, tl.db_name, tl.org_id, tl.created_at 
FROM table_list AS tl
JOIN column_list AS cl ON tl.table_name = cl.table_name AND tl.db_name = cl.db_name AND tl.org_id = cl.org_id
WHERE cl.column_name = 'created_at' AND tl.org_id = 10006;

queries.query: List tables that have both created_at and updated_at
Find tables that have an email column
queries.sql:
SELECT tl.table_name, tl.db_name, cl.column_name, cl.data_type 
FROM table_list AS tl 
JOIN column_list AS cl ON tl.table_name = cl.table_name AND tl.db_name = cl.db_name AND tl.org_id = cl.org_id 
WHERE cl.column_name = 'email' AND tl.org_id = 10006;

queries.query: Show all ENUM columns and their possible values
Show all columns of type INT in the database
List all columns of type VARCHAR with length > 100
queries.sql:
SELECT cl.column_name, cl.table_name, cl.data_type, cl.column_type 
FROM column_list AS cl 
WHERE cl.org_id = 10006 
AND cl.data_type = 'varchar' 
AND CHAR_LENGTH(cl.column_type) > 100;

queries.query: Show all decimal or float columns
Which tables have a status column?
queries.sql:
SELECT tl.table_name, tl.db_name 
FROM table_list AS tl
JOIN column_list AS cl ON tl.table_name = cl.table_name AND tl.db_name = cl.db_name AND tl.org_id = cl.org_id
WHERE cl.column_name = 'status' AND tl.org_id = 10006;

queries.query: List tables with a name or title column
queries.sql:
SELECT tl.table_name, cl.column_name 
FROM table_list AS tl 
JOIN column_list AS cl ON tl.table_name = cl.table_name AND tl.db_name = cl.db_name AND tl.org_id = cl.org_id 
WHERE tl.org_id = 10006 AND (cl.column_name = 'name' OR cl.column_name = 'title');

queries.query: Show all columns with the word "hash" in their name
Find all columns that store tokens or keys
queries.sql:
SELECT cl.column_name, cl.table_name, cl.data_type
FROM column_list AS cl
WHERE cl.org_id = 10006
AND (cl.column_name LIKE '%token%' OR cl.column_name LIKE '%key%')
AND cl.is_deleted IS NULL;

queries.query: Show tables that have a deleted_at or is_deleted column
List all columns that have "expires" in their name
Show all columns of type TIMESTAMP
Show the full schema of all tables sorted alphabetically
queries.sql:
SELECT tl.table_name, tl.db_name, tl.org_id, tl.is_deleted, tl.created_at, tl.updated_at, tl.table_type, tl.engine, tl.table_rows
FROM table_list AS tl
WHERE tl.org_id = 10006
ORDER BY tl.table_name;

queries.query: Which tables have the most number of relationships?
queries.sql:
SELECT rl.source_table, COUNT(rl.relationship_id) AS relationship_count
FROM relationships AS rl
WHERE rl.org_id = 10006
GROUP BY rl.source_table
ORDER BY relationship_count DESC;

queries.query: List tables that are used as lookup/reference tables
Show all tables that have at least 3 indexes
queries.sql:
SELECT tl.table_name, tl.db_name, COUNT(im.index_id) AS index_count
FROM table_list AS tl
JOIN indexes_metadata AS im ON tl.table_name = im.table_name AND tl.db_name = im.db_name AND tl.org_id = im.org_id
WHERE tl.org_id = 10006
GROUP BY tl.table_name, tl.db_name
HAVING index_count >= 3;

queries.query: Which column names are most common across all tables?
queries.sql:
SELECT cl.column_name, COUNT(*) AS column_count
FROM column_list AS cl
JOIN table_list AS tl ON cl.table_name = tl.table_name AND cl.db_name = tl.db_name AND cl.org_id = tl.org_id
WHERE tl.org_id = 10006
GROUP BY cl.column_name
ORDER BY column_count DESC;

queries.query: Show all columns that are part of any unique constraint
Find tables that share common column names
queries.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT t1.table_name AS table1, t2.table_name AS table2, c.column_name
FROM column_list c
JOIN table_list t1 ON c.table_name = t1.table_name AND c.db_name = t1.db_name AND c.org_id = t1.org_id
JOIN column_list c2 ON c.column_name = c2.column_name AND c.table_name <> c2.table_name
JOIN table_list t2 ON c2.table_name = t2.table_name AND c2.db_name = t2.db_name AND c2.org_id = t2.org_id
WHERE t1.org_id = 10006 AND t2.org_id = 10006
ORDER BY c.column_name, t1.table_name, t2.table_name;

queries.query: List all indexes on tables that have foreign keys
queries.sql:
SELECT im.index_name, im.column_name, im.table_name
FROM indexes_metadata im
JOIN relationships r ON im.org_id = r.org_id AND im.db_name = r.db_name
WHERE im.org_id = 10006;

queries.query: Show all tables with both a primary key and at least one foreign key
queries.sql:
SELECT tl.table_name, tl.db_name, tl.table_type, tl.engine, tl.table_rows
FROM table_list AS tl
JOIN relationships AS r ON tl.table_name = r.source_table AND tl.db_name = r.db_name AND tl.org_id = r.org_id
WHERE tl.org_id = 10006
GROUP BY tl.table_name, tl.db_name
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT r.relationship_id) > 0;

queries.query: Count total number of columns across all tables in the database
Show me all the tables in this database
How many tables are there in total?
What are the column names of the first table?
queries.sql:
SELECT c.column_name 
FROM column_list AS c 
JOIN table_list AS t ON c.table_name = t.table_name AND c.db_name = t.db_name AND c.org_id = t.org_id 
WHERE t.org_id = 10006 AND t.table_type = 'first_table';

queries.query: Show all column data types used in the database
How many total columns are there in the database?
Which table has the most columns?
queries.sql:
SELECT cl.table_name, COUNT(cl.column_name) AS column_count
FROM column_list AS cl
JOIN table_list AS tl ON cl.table_name = tl.table_name AND cl.db_name = tl.db_name AND cl.org_id = tl.org_id
WHERE tl.org_id = 10006
GROUP BY cl.table_name
ORDER BY column_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

queries.query: Which table has the fewest columns?
queries.sql:
SELECT tl.table_name, COUNT(cl.column_name) AS column_count
FROM table_list AS tl
LEFT JOIN column_list AS cl ON tl.table_name = cl.table_name AND tl.db_name = cl.db_name AND tl.org_id = cl.org_id
WHERE tl.org_id = 10006
GROUP BY tl.table_name
ORDER BY column_count ASC
LIMIT 1;

queries.query: Show all tables and whether they have primary keys
queries.sql:
SELECT tl.table_name, 
       tl.db_name, 
       tl.org_id, 
       CASE 
           WHEN cl.table_name IS NOT NULL THEN 'Yes' 
           ELSE 'No' 
       END AS has_primary_key
FROM table_list AS tl
LEFT JOIN column_list AS cl ON tl.table_name = cl.table_name 
                             AND tl.db_name = cl.db_name 
                             AND tl.org_id = cl.org_id
WHERE tl.org_id = 10006;

queries.query: List tables sorted by number of columns descending
queries.sql:
SELECT tl.table_name, COUNT(cl.column_name) AS column_count
FROM table_list AS tl
LEFT JOIN column_list AS cl ON tl.table_name = cl.table_name AND tl.db_name = cl.db_name AND tl.org_id = cl.org_id
WHERE tl.org_id = 10006
GROUP BY tl.table_name
ORDER BY column_count DESC;

queries.query: Show the column count for each table
queries.sql:
SELECT tl.table_name, COUNT(cl.column_name) AS column_count
FROM table_list AS tl
LEFT JOIN column_list AS cl ON tl.table_name = cl.table_name AND tl.db_name = cl.db_name AND tl.org_id = cl.org_id
WHERE tl.org_id = 10006
GROUP BY tl.table_name;

queries.query: How many columns are of type VARCHAR?
How many columns are of type INT?
How many columns are of type BIGINT?
How many columns are of type TEXT?
How many columns are of type DATETIME or TIMESTAMP?
Show all unique data types used in the database
How many columns use ENUM type?
Count columns by data type
queries.sql:
SELECT cl.data_type, COUNT(*) AS column_count
FROM column_list AS cl
WHERE cl.org_id = 10006
GROUP BY cl.data_type;

queries.query: Which data type is most commonly used?
queries.sql:
SELECT data_type, COUNT(*) AS type_count
FROM column_list
WHERE org_id = 10006
GROUP BY data_type
ORDER BY type_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

queries.query: Show all nullable column counts per table
queries.sql:
SELECT tl.table_name, COUNT(cl.column_name) AS nullable_column_count
FROM table_list AS tl
JOIN column_list AS cl ON tl.table_name = cl.table_name AND tl.db_name = cl.db_name AND tl.org_id = cl.org_id
WHERE tl.org_id = 10006 AND cl.is_nullable = 1
GROUP BY tl.table_name;

queries.query: How many foreign key relationships exist in total?
Which table has the most foreign keys?
queries.sql:
SELECT source_table, COUNT(*) AS foreign_key_count
FROM relationships
WHERE org_id = 10006
GROUP BY source_table
ORDER BY foreign_key_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

queries.query: How many tables have no foreign keys?
queries.sql:
SELECT COUNT(t.table_name) AS table_count
FROM table_list AS t
LEFT JOIN relationships AS r ON t.table_name = r.source_table AND t.db_name = r.db_name AND t.org_id = r.org_id
WHERE t.org_id = 10006 AND r.relationship_id IS NULL;

queries.query: Show a summary of primary keys for each table
queries.sql:
SELECT 
    tl.table_name, 
    tl.db_name, 
    tl.org_id 
FROM 
    table_list AS tl 
WHERE 
    tl.org_id = 10006;

queries.query: How many tables have composite primary keys?
Which table has the most indexes?
queries.sql:
SELECT im.table_name, COUNT(im.index_id) AS index_count
FROM indexes_metadata im
WHERE im.org_id = 10006 AND im.is_deleted IS NULL
GROUP BY im.table_name
ORDER BY index_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

queries.query: How many total indexes are there in the database?
Show the average number of columns per table
queries.sql:
SELECT AVG(column_count) AS average_columns_per_table
FROM (
    SELECT cl.table_name, COUNT(cl.column_name) AS column_count
    FROM column_list AS cl
    JOIN table_list AS tl ON cl.table_name = tl.table_name AND cl.db_name = tl.db_name AND cl.org_id = tl.org_id
    WHERE cl.org_id = 10006 AND tl.is_deleted IS NULL
    GROUP BY cl.table_name
) AS table_column_counts;

queries.query: Which tables have exactly one column?
queries.sql:
SELECT tl.table_name, tl.db_name
FROM table_list AS tl
JOIN column_list AS cl ON tl.table_name = cl.table_name AND tl.db_name = cl.db_name AND tl.org_id = cl.org_id
WHERE tl.org_id = 10006
GROUP BY tl.table_name, tl.db_name
HAVING COUNT(cl.column_name) = 1;

queries.query: Show all tables with their column names in a flat list
queries.sql:
SELECT tl.table_name, cl.column_name 
FROM table_list AS tl 
JOIN column_list AS cl ON tl.table_name = cl.table_name AND tl.db_name = cl.db_name AND tl.org_id = cl.org_id 
WHERE tl.org_id = 10006;
